title: Empathy: Attunement
description: Structured conversion of the legacy attunement slides.

sources.label: Diana Fosha, The Transforming Power of Affect
Legacy video: How do we get to our core pain?

slides.title: Attunement
slides.body: Moment-to-moment tracking of affect, body, pace, and meaning.
bullets: Track voice, breath, gaze, posture, and hesitation.
Reflect feeling plus meaning, then check fit.
Use misattunement as a repair opportunity.

slides.title: Use your body as an instrument
slides.body: Attunement guides the next intervention toward what is alive now.
items: Notice what changes in you as the client speaks.
Reflect tentatively: I may be off.
Watch whether the client softens, corrects, or withdraws.
Repair early: I think I missed you.

slides.title: Core pain and empathic tracking
slides.body: Legacy media converted into the structured slide system.

media.title: How do we get to our core pain?
